other_findings.finding: Fb3 (F3) is a minor fibroblast population in healthy human adult skin alongside Fb1 (F1) and Fb2 (F2)
Dermal fibroblast heterogeneity encompassing structural and immunomodulatory subtypes has been previously reported at single cell level
